languages.text: "Обычно наказание за драку — не менее двадцати плетей каждому участнику оной..." {n}Сенешаль утирает кровь, пошедшую носом, и продолжает уже тише.{/n} "...но в данных обстоятельствах, полагаю, можно сделать поблажку".

traits.locale_text: "Обычно наказание за драку — не менее двадцати плетей каждому участнику оной..." {n}Сенешаль утирает кровь, пошедшую носом, и продолжает уже тише.{/n} "...но в данных обстоятельствах, полагаю, можно сдлелать поблажку".
traits.speaker: AbelardCompanion

languages.text: "The standard punishment for brawling is no less than twenty lashes for each participant." {n}The Seneschal wipes away the blood trickling from his nose and continues, more quietly.{/n} "But under the present circumstances, I believe some leniency may be shown."
languages.original_text: "Обычно наказание за драку — не менее двадцати плетей каждому участнику оной..." {n}Сенешаль утирает кровь, пошедшую носом, и продолжает уже тише.{/n} "...но в данных обстоятельствах, полагаю, можно сделать поблажку".

"The standard punishment for brawling is no less than twenty lashes for each participant." {n}The Seneschal wipes away the blood trickling from his nose and continues, more quietly.{/n} "But under the present circumstances, I believe some leniency may be shown."

languages.text: «El castigo reglamentario por las peleas es un mínimo de veinte latigazos por participante...». {n}El Senescal se seca la sangre que gotea de su nariz y continúa con voz más baja.{/n} «... pero, dadas las circunstancias, creo que se puede mostrar un poco de indulgencia».
languages.original_text: "The standard punishment for brawling is no less than twenty lashes for each participant." {n}The Seneschal wipes away the blood trickling from his nose and continues, more quietly.{/n} "...but under the present circumstances, I believe some leniency may be shown."

traits.locale_text: «El castigo reglamentario por las peleas es un mínimo de veinte latigazos por participante...». {n}El Senescal se seca la sangre que gotea de su nariz y continúa con voz más baja.{/n} «... pero, dadas las circunstancias, creo que se puede mostrar un poco de indulgencia».

languages.text: “按标准惩处，参与斗殴者，每人至少该挨二十鞭。”{n}总领拭去鼻中淌下的鲜血，接着说了下去，语气愈发低沉。{/n}“……然而，眼下为非常时刻，稍许宽容也未尝不可。”
languages.original_text: "The standard punishment for brawling is no less than twenty lashes for each participant." {n}The Seneschal wipes away the blood trickling from his nose and continues, more quietly.{/n} "...but under the present circumstances, I believe some leniency may be shown."

traits.locale_text: “按标准惩处，参与斗殴者，每人至少该挨二十鞭。”{n}总领拭去鼻中淌下的鲜血，接着说了下去，语气愈发低沉。{/n}“……然而，眼下为非常时刻，稍许宽容也未尝不可。”

languages.text: « Le châtiment ordinaire pour les bagarres est de vingt coups de fouet pour chaque participant. » {n}Le sénéchal essuie le sang qui coule de son nez et continue d'une voix plus basse :{/n} « Cela étant dit, compte tenu des circonstances, je crois que la clémence est de mise. »
languages.original_text: "The standard punishment for brawling is no less than twenty lashes for each participant." {n}The Seneschal wipes away the blood trickling from his nose and continues, more quietly.{/n} "...but under the present circumstances, I believe some leniency may be shown."

traits.locale_text: « Le châtiment ordinaire pour les bagarres est de vingt coups de fouet pour chaque participant. » {n}Le sénéchal essuie le sang qui coule de son nez et continue d'une voix plus basse :{/n} « Cela étant dit, compte tenu des circonstances, je crois que la clémence est de mise. »

languages.text: "Kavga etmenin standart cezası, katılımcı başına yirmi kırbaçtan az değildir." {n}Seneşal, burnundan sızan kanı siliyor ve sessizce devam ediyor.{/n} "Ancak mevcut koşullar altında biraz hoşgörü gösterilebileceğine inanıyorum."
languages.original_text: "The standard punishment for brawling is no less than twenty lashes for each participant." {n}The Seneschal wipes away the blood trickling from his nose and continues, more quietly.{/n} "...but under the present circumstances, I believe some leniency may be shown."

traits.locale_text: "Kavga etmenin standart cezası, katılımcı başına yirmi kırbaçtan az değildir." {n}Seneşal, burnundan sızan kanı siliyor ve sessizce devam ediyor.{/n} "Ancak mevcut koşullar altında biraz hoşgörü gösterilebileceğine inanıyorum."

languages.text: "Die Standardstrafe für Schlägereien sind nicht weniger als zwanzig Peitschenhiebe für alle Beteiligten." {n}Der Truchsess wischt sich das Blut von seiner Nase und fährt etwas ruhiger fort.{/n} "Aber unter den gegebenen Umständen ist wohl eine gewisse Milde geboten."
languages.original_text: "The standard punishment for brawling is no less than twenty lashes for each participant." {n}The Seneschal wipes away the blood trickling from his nose and continues, more quietly.{/n} "...but under the present circumstances, I believe some leniency may be shown."

traits.locale_text: "Die Standardstrafe für Schlägereien sind nicht weniger als zwanzig Peitschenhiebe für alle Beteiligten." {n}Der Truchsess wischt sich das Blut von seiner Nase und fährt etwas ruhiger fort.{/n} "Aber unter den gegebenen Umständen ist wohl eine gewisse Milde geboten."

languages.text: 「喧嘩の罰は、参加者一人につき最低20回の鞭打ちである。」{n}執事の鼻から流れ落ちる血を拭いながら、彼は静かに続けた。{/n}「しかし、現在の状況を考えると、ある程度の寛大さを見せることができるだろう。」
languages.original_text: "The standard punishment for brawling is no less than twenty lashes for each participant." {n}The Seneschal wipes away the blood trickling from his nose and continues, more quietly.{/n} "But under the present circumstances, I believe some leniency may be shown."

traits.locale_text: 「喧嘩の罰は、参加者一人につき最低20回の鞭打ちである。」{n}執事の鼻から流れ落ちる血を拭いながら、彼は静かに続けた。{/n}「しかし、現在の状況を考えると、ある程度の寛大さを見せることができるだろう。」
